Item Name: Giesen Non-Alcoholic Sauvignon Blanc - Premium Dealcoholized White Wine from New Zealand | 2 PACK
Bullet Point 1: Alcohol-Free Perfection: Introducing Giesen 0%, an expertly crafted alcohol-removed wine derived from our premium full-strength Sauvignon Blanc, providing the delightful taste of Giesen Estate without the alcohol content.
Bullet Point 2: Delicate Aromas: Experience subtle scents of fresh lime, redcurrant, and lemon short-bread that entice your senses.
Bullet Point 3: Vibrant Citrus Flavors: Indulge in delicious citrus flavors, highlighted by distinct black-currant and passionfruit notes, defining this premium New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc.
Bullet Point 4: Crisp and Dry Finish: The wine concludes with a crisp, dry finish, leaving a mouth-watering, juicy brightness that beckons for another sip.
Bullet Point 5: Light and Refreshing: Discover its light, fresh, and invigorating character, making it an ideal choice for enjoying at home, with friends and family, or whenever you desire a glass of wine without the typical after-effects.
Bullet Point 6: Guilt-Free Enjoyment: Indulge guilt-free with only 16 calories per 125ml serving – a remarkable 80% fewer calories than full-strength wine. For the health-conscious, it's even better: just 13 calories per 100ml glass!
Bullet Point 7: Includes (2) 750ml Bottles of Sauvignon Blanc, Tasting Notes and Phone/Tablet Holder

Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium dealcoholized wine positioned as a high-quality, alcohol-free alternative to traditional Sauvignon Blanc. The packaging and branding emphasize luxury and sophistication, with a focus on health-conscious consumers. The bundle deal of two 750ml bottles offers value for those seeking a guilt-free wine experience.

Bullet Point 1: Organic
Bullet Point 2: No Added Sugars
Bullet Point 3: Vegan
Bullet Point 4: Kosher

Product Description: Drizzled with 100% cacao. USDA Organic. Certified Organic by Certimex S.C. 100% Vegan. No added sugar (Not a low calorie food. See nutrition facts panel for information on sugars and calories). Our Promise: No added Sugar: We Solely use mangoes and cacao for our drizzled fruit - there’s no added sugar, ever. We start by coaxing a rich chocolate drizzle from single origin cacao beans. Our perfectly ripe mangoes add just right amount of sweetness without any added sugar. No preservatives. No sulfites. Non-GMO Project verified. nongmoproject.org. Just whole fruit & cacao. Mango Drizzled with Chocolatey Cacao: In ancient Mexico, the Mayans and Aztecs considered cacao a treasured treat. Inspired by this traditional delicacy, Solely organic mangoes with cacao are delightful companions on your daily adventures. We begin by picking perfectly ripened mangoes from our Solely certified farms. Selecting only the highest quality, we slice and gently dry at our own drying facilities. Then we drizzle on just the right amount of organic cacao to create a naturally sweet, yet less guilty, version of a chocolate-coated snack. Indulge your taste buds and your soul. At Solely, we never add sugar, sulfites or preservatives. Our dried mango is drizzled with 100% cacao and has no emulsifiers, waxes, soy lecithin or sugars. Real cacao is real chocolatey but requires a little more care. www.solely.com. Resealable bag for freshness. BPA free. Recyclable materials. This package may not be recyclable in your area. Made in Mexico.
Value: 2.8
Unit: Ounce
product_name: Organic Dried Fruit Mango & Dark Chocolate Strips
overall_summary: Premium organic snack with high-quality ingredients and certifications, positioned as a healthier indulgence.
